title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Amazon Books India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Amazon Books India
jsonLd.description:
Amazon Books India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Amazon Books India:
Amazon Books India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
